name: maturity-model
description: Evaluate maturity model slides — capability-by-level grids with current and target state clarity
goal: Achieve consistent 12+/14 with a disciplined maturity grid, restrained text density, and explicit current-to-target movement

prompts.text: Build a cyber maturity model slide across identity, detection, response, resilience, and governance with five maturity levels, current-state markers, and target-state markers
Build a data platform maturity model slide across data quality, self-service analytics, governance, operating model, and tooling
